title: callista barbatula
side_effects: Callista barbatula can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal problems. In rare cases, it may cause dizziness, headaches, and nausea. Prolonged or excessive use of Callista barbatula can also lead to kidney damage and interact with certain medications, resulting in adverse health consequences. If not used under the guidance of a medical professional, the plant's toxic compounds can cause serious health issues.
